reason: Bitcoin is demonstrating a clear rebound towards the $70,000 level, fueled by substantial ETF inflows, suggesting a transition into a Markup phase. While buying pressure is evident, the initial observation of significant inflows without immediate price appreciation, coupled with persistent geopolitical tensions (Mideast woes), highlights underlying market complexities and elevated risk. Vigilance is advised to monitor whether the current momentum can overcome macro headwinds and establish new highs.
headlines: Over a billion flows into bitcoin ETFs, yet the price isn’t rising — an analyst explains why
Bitcoin holds, ether, solana slide as Mideast woes drag Asian equities to multi-year lows
Ripple expands payments platform into end-to-end stablecoin infrastructure as processed volume tops $100 billion
Polymarket shelves nuclear detonation markets after outcry
Bitcoin rebounds toward $70,000 as ETFs pull in $1.45 billion in five days
